text: Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose up to 3 characters – honor each of those character.
flavorText: "Let them see the beauty you have created and they shall bear witness to their shame."
name: The Way of Peace

text: X is equal to half the amount of honor in your honor pool, rounded up.
flavorText: "I am a samurai of the Lion Clan, and I can no longer bear to see it kept low." - Matsu Tsuko
name: The Roar of the Lioness

text: Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose a character – place 1 fate on that character and honor it.
flavorText: "I will never forget the sound of my brother's lifeless body striking the ground at his hand." - Mirumoto Hitomi
name: Cycle of Vengeance

text: Action: During a conflict, sacrifice another character - this characters gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: Even the warriors of the Crab whisper fearfully of the uncanny efficiency illustrated by Forgotten samurai.
name: Silent Skirmisher

text: Keeper role only. Action: Lose 2 honor. Choose a character - place 1 fate on that character.
flavorText: "I will not allow the Taint to take you."
name: Master of Jade

text: While this character is honored, you may play each card underneath it as if it were in your hand. Reaction: After this character enters play - search your conflict deck for 4 cards and place them underneath this character facedown (out of play). When this character leaves play, remove each facedown card underneath it from the game.
name: Daidoji Uji

text: While this character is ordinary, it gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political].
flavorText: "If they think to deny us Shinsei's salvation, we will take our fate into our own hands."
name: Perfect Land Believer

text:
Each other [clan-lion] character you control gets +1[conflict-military].
During the fate phase, if you have at least 5 more honor than an opponent, fate cannot be removed from [clan-lion] characters you control with printed cost 3 or lower.
name: Commander of the Legions

text: Dire - This character gets +3[conflict-political]. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.) Action: During a [element-earth] conflict, select one - the attacked province gets either +3 strength or -3 strength until the end of the conflict.
name: Steward of Cryptic Lore

text: Characters played from adjacent provinces enter play honored and you cannot place fate on them when they are played.
flavorText: Any who wish to train in the defense of others is welcome among the Shiba.
name: Guardian Dōjō

text: Dire - this character gains: "Action: Look at the top 8 cards of your conflict deck. Then, discard any number of those cards and put the rest back on top in any order." (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
name: Shoju's Diviner

text: Keeper role only. Dire - While this character is participating in a conflict, bowed participating characters contribute their skill toward the resolution of the conflict. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
name: Nimble Noyan

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character you control - move that character to the conflict. (Limit twice per round.)
name: Reserve Tents

text: Water role only. This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control. Action: During a conflict, dishonor a (friendly) participating character - bow each participating character with lower [conflict-military] skill than that of the dishonored character.
name: Darkness Rising

text: Earth role only. Reaction: After you win a [conflict-military] conflict against a non-stronghold province, dishonor a participating (friendly) character and break a faceup (friendly) province - break the attacked province.
name: Raze to the Ground

text: Water role only. Action: Reveal a (friendly) facedown province. Choose an ordinary character - ready that character.
flavorText: "If it gets me through the day, it is enough."
name: Shoshi ni Kie

text: Attach to an unbroken province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province. During a conflict at attached province, increase the cost for each player to play each card from their hand by 1, unless that player has at least 5 more honor than their opponent.
name: Under Amaterasu's Gaze

text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Attach to an unbroken province you control.
Attached province gets +3 strength.
As an additional cost to declare 1 or more defenders during a conflict at attached province, you must lose 1 honor.
name: Unhallow

text: Courtesy. (When this character leaves play, gain 1 fate)
flavorText: Dread drove him faster than his own heartbeat. If his lord could not prevail, what could even the regent do against such demonic power? Yet, if he failed to reach Shoju in time, what hope remained?
name: Messenger of Misery

text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Attached character gains covert and cannot be honored.
name: Shape the Flesh

text: This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control. Ancestral. Attached character gains the Cavalry trait. Action: If attached character has no fate on it, lose 1 honor - ready attached character.
name: Shadow Steed

text: Each other attachment on attached character gains restricted.
flavorText: "Do you think to mock me, little spider? I will not let you ruin the first profitable job I've seen in weeks with your boldness."
name: Curse of Misfortune
